shadows.name: artifact-edge
shadows.purpose: Structural edge under project screenshots only.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: Compact, direct action used at major decision points.

components.name: Contact Field
components.description: Persistent label and structural bottom rule.
components.css: .ds-field { display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;color:#191210;font:720 12px/1.2 Archivo,Arial,sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height:52px;border:0;border-bottom:1px solid #191210;border-radius:0;background:#fafafa;color:#191210;font:400 16px/1.6 Archivo,Arial,sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #0045b0;outline-offset:4px;border-bottom-color:#0045b0; }

components.name: Slim Navigation
components.description: Sticky section navigation with underline response.
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:32px;padding:20px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #b2a8a5;background:#f3f3f3;color:#191210;font:720 12px/1.2 Archivo,Arial,sans-serif; } .ds-nav strong { margin-right:auto; } .ds-nav a { color:inherit;text-decoration-underline-offset:7px; } .ds-nav a:hover { text-decoration:underline; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #0045b0;outline-offset:4px; }

components.name: Project Artifact
components.description: Image-led evidence surface with a tight structural edge.

narrative.overview: The system feels like a carefully composed working surface: modular, direct, personal, and connected to real output. Visible seams and asymmetric fields create order; portraiture, ember color, and responsive behavior supply warmth. The interface is experimental in composition, not in usability.
keyCharacteristics: Capability-first hierarchy with proof in the first viewport.
Graphite reading structure and committed ember fields.
Visible seams, limited rounding, and physical project artifacts.
Section-specific motion with a complete reduced-motion path.
Clean reading surfaces; grain appears only where color is the material.

rules.name: The Clean Reading Rule
rules.body: Noise and gradients are forbidden behind body copy. They belong only to portrait, project-image, or closing fields.

rules.name: The Functional Blue Rule
rules.body: Focus blue is never used decoratively; its rarity makes keyboard focus unmistakable.

rules.name: The 0.04 Rule
rules.body: Display letter spacing is never tighter than -0.04em.

rules.name: The Structural Depth Rule
rules.body: If a module needs a wide soft shadow to feel separate, the composition is wrong. Fix the seam, tone, or spacing.

dos: Do lead with capability and place proof in the first viewport.
Do keep body lines below 70ch and text contrast at WCAG AA.
Do give hover interactions equivalent keyboard and touch behavior.
donts: Don't build generic polished SaaS with glass cards, pastel blobs, or interchangeable feature grids.
Don't use developer-terminal brutalism or monospace decoration.
Don't use youthful candy palettes, pervasive faux-vintage noise, or decorative motion without meaning.
